name: python3-httpx-sse
title: python3-httpx-sse
summary: Consume Server-Sent Event (SSE) messages with HTTPX (Python 3)
description:
Consume Server-Sent Event (SSE) messages with HTTPX (Python 3)
HTTPX-SSE simplifies the consumption of Server-Sent Events (SSE) in Python
applications using the HTTPX library.
.
It provides convenient helpers for synchronous and asynchronous SSE
connections with customizable retry and reconnection mechanisms.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-httpx-sse because Consume Server-Sent Event (SSE) messages with HTTPX (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-httpx-sse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-httpx-sse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-httpx-sse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
